projects.title: A value-driven framework to model the impact of commercial thinning on timber supply and climate change mitigation potential in BC's interior forests.
projects.summary: A confirmed current FRESH project focused on commercial thinning, timber supply, and climate change mitigation potential in BC's interior forests.
body: Commercial thinning can shift the timing of harvested volume and may help mitigate mid-term timber supply shortages in forests with unbalanced age class structures.
This project evaluates economically viable commercial thinning treatments and their potential to enhance timber supply while supporting climate change mitigation in BC's interior forests.
The project uses a value-driven modelling framework to connect treatment schedules, timber supply effects, and climate-related outcomes.
